entries.title: Kabir’s Reflections
entries.body:
This humble work is a collection of my innermost reflections and thoughts, shaped as words from the heart. Inspired by the teachings and spirit of Pir O Murshid, I began this journey of expression—an attempt to give voice to the subtle stirrings within.
With my deepest reverence, I present these writings to the most humble and kind soul I have had the privilege to witness in this lifetime: Pir Zia.
I confess that these writings are but the attempts of a child, primitive in form and feeling, and I sincerely beg your forgiveness for any errors or shortcomings you may find within these pages.
May this offering be received with the same compassion and understanding that inspired its creation.

entries.title: Air and Water
entries.body: "Nowhere in this universe is there water and air such as on Earth. Wouldn't that make air and water the most precious and expensive treasures in this whole universe? Then how could one waste these gifts and forget their true worth?"

entries.title: Breath
entries.body: "Breathing is all about consuming universal consciousness in the form of vibration, frequency, energy and light."

entries.title: Breathe Rightfully
entries.body:
"If air is the most precious in this whole universe, then is it not wise to breathe rightfully to feed your body and soul?
Breath not only feeds your body but also your soul, for when you cease to breathe, your body dies and your soul leaves the body."

entries.title: Chanting
entries.body: "If you breathe in silently chanting his divine name, you are putting a filter to remove any unwanted thoughts from entering, and also you are putting a funnel for him to pass directly into your soul."

entries.title: Imprints
entries.body:
“What veils the soul is an immense expanse of empty space — a vast field capable of holding every thought, emotion, memory, action, and bodily sensation.
This space doesn’t just carry the weight of a single lifetime; the soul has the capacity to hold the imprints of thousands of births and rebirths.”

entries.title: Child in my Heart
entries.body: Allah might be the ruler of the entire universe, but he is a child in my heart."

entries.title: Dance of the Flower
entries.body: Don't you see how the flowers, trees and plants move and dance in joy to the melody of nature's music? Humans often fail to observe or listen to this divine tune, but the flowers, trees, the plants, the rivers—even the rocks—hear it. They move in harmony, dancing in joy and ecstasy to this sacred rhythm.

entries.title: Disease
entries.body:
"There is no disease in the energetic body.
Disease is only the dysfunction of your temporary physical body."

entries.title: DNA
entries.body: "Your DNA is the blueprint of your ancestral lineage."

entries.title: Eightfold Yoga
entries.body: "God is not to be sought through the practices of the Eightfold Yoga, meditation, spiritual rituals, prayers, or contemplation. To know yourself, no methods or practices are necessary."

entries.title: Don’t be fooled
entries.body:
"Don't be fooled to think that your soul is hidden somewhere deep inside your heart, sleeping and not involved in your ego self's worldly, materialistic act. And that it's your ego self doing all the thinking, action, experiencing emotions, moods, and everything.
The soul is in fact the experiencer of your totality of all experiences, including sleep. The deep emotions you experience are supplied by your soul. When you deeply experience love, your soul supplies the emotion and also takes part in the experience.
Every thought and action creates an energy signature mark on the soul, limiting it towards liberation."

entries.title: Empty Spaces
entries.body:
"So what is covering the soul is a hell of a lot of empty spaces that can hold a person's every single thought, emotion, feeling, memory, action, and even bodily activity.
The soul can not just hold this life's baggage, but it has the capacity to hold thousands of your birth and rebirth memories."

entries.title: Energy Transport
entries.body:
"If you think the energy you generate and operate on is coming from the food and nutrition you eat, then you are fooling yourself.
The food and nutrients are only the transporters of the energy. We access the unlimited universal cosmic energy, and in fact we are oscillating in and out of this energy field."

entries.title: Experiences
entries.body:
"What are spiritual experiences?
Like the mundane gross human life always in the quest of experiences that can thrill, entertain, and satisfy the ego self, similarly those in the spiritual path are drawn by the desire and the lust for experiences as proof for their spiritual path and growth.
In the true sense, a fully realized ego self does not have any experiences nor wish for those. As the soul is always pure, uninterested, and unshaken by any thoughts, desires, lust, and never wishes for any experience."

entries.title: First Cry
entries.body: Remember the first cry and the last sigh

entries.title: Fish to water
entries.body:
"God is nearer than you think he is. He is nearer than a fish to water.
It's foolishness to think you need to seek him outside of you."

entries.title: Grain of Rice
entries.body: "I am but a grain of rice, holding all potency and energy, yet my true worth lies in the hands of the Creator to be consumed. Just as a seed is nurtured to become a grain, so too is life grown—physically, mentally, and spiritually—to be offered back to the Divine to be consumed."

entries.title: Guest
entries.body: "I am but a temporary guest in this body and will need to remember to return back to my source, my permanent home one day," SAID the SOUL.

entries.title: Guest's Reverence
entries.body: "You are only a guest in this world. The air, water, and food you eat are his and not yours—live with that reverence."

entries.title: Healer
entries.body: "It's not the Healer but HE who heals the sufferer."

entries.title: Healing is a Mystery
entries.body: "Healing is a mystery as long as you don't realize that it's within you."

entries.title: Humming
entries.body:
“Humming is a natural response in humans. You hum when you’re happy. You also hum when you’re in pain—it’s your body’s natural way of healing. A mother hums to her baby when she wants the baby to sleep.”
Calibrated and rhythmic humming can do wonders to your body and mind."

entries.title: In exchange
entries.body: "I offer Allah my true wealth which is devotion, love, and sincerity—in exchange for Him.

entries.title: Indestructible
entries.body:
"If energy is indestructible, then every moment you are existing and experiencing, your thoughts and actions are leaving energy signatures which are not perished and are relative to your non-physical existence.
So even when your physical body perishes, your non-physical body still lives with the relative thoughts and experiences tied by energy signatures. You are a pack of bits and pieces of energy residue that stores all your memories, thoughts, and experiences

entries.title: Inner Controller
entries.body: "The Soul is the controller of your Inner Breath."

entries.title: Instruments
entries.body:
“Each musical instrument type has a specific vibratory effect on our body.
Wind instruments resonate with our inner soul, heart, and brain.
String instruments influence our nervous and cardiovascular systems.
Piano stimulates muscles and tissues.
Drums activate the heart as well as the blood and fluids in your body.”

entries.title: It's not your ego self
entries.body:
"The soul lives thousands of lives without knowing its origin or the need for returning back.
Spiritual journey starts when we feed and nourish the soul with the primordial sounds, frequency, vibration, and energy that carry the message of truth.
It's not your ego self undergoing the spiritual journey, but the soul is awakened and begins the journey.

entries.title: Kingdom of Precious
entries.body: "If in man's kingdom gold and diamonds are precious and expensive, then in God's kingdom air, water, and plants are the most precious possessions."

entries.title: Laziness
entries.body: "Divinity and laziness cannot exist together. In divine work there's no place for laziness, else the universe wouldn't have survived."

entries.title: Liberate the Soul
entries.body: "Your every thought, action, emotion, and everything else keeps the soul pulling back. Liberate the soul from your thoughts and actions so the soul can continue its journey."

entries.title: Liberation and Realization
entries.body:
What is true liberation, realization, ascension?
It is when the ego self dissolves into the soul, and the soul, transcending all limits, merges with the primordial sounds—OM, HU, Allah, AH—until these sacred tones melt into the universal energy itself.
These sounds are not just uttered, they are born of _prana_—the life force— ever-flowing within and when it meets the fire element, these subtle vibrational sounds are created.

entries.title: Lullaby
entries.body: "Lullaby is a text message from mother's heart to the baby's brain letting it know that we are safe and it's ok to go to sleep. It's a unique vibration created in the heart of the mother when she sings or hum. This vibration frequency calms the heart, mind, and brain and puts the baby to sleep."

entries.title: Medicine
entries.body: "Medicine may turn to poison, poison may turn to medicine. Allah alone knows the true nature of things - who are we to make such judgments?"

entries.title: Nothingness
entries.body: "He possesses nothing, yet gives everything. The entire universe bends to his will, yet he possesses nothing. He is spread across all existence, yet he possesses nothing. But in one thing he is enslaved - your love. You send love as gift, and he receives it with grace."

entries.title: Observe
entries.body: Observe closely what you breathe in. It’s not just air, gases, molecules, or atoms—you’re inhaling something far more profound : sounds, vibrations, frequencies, light and energy. This is what feeds and nourishes the soul in its subtle form.

entries.title: Ocean of Love
entries.body: "Inside this ocean of love that I swim, is there a place that's empty? Just as the ocean holds no space without water, this love leaves no corner unfilled."

entries.title: Outer Shell
entries.body: "The path to self-realization and liberation belongs to the soul, not the ego-self. Your ego is merely the outer shell that falls away when one dies, discarded at death's threshold. What transcends death, what crosses into eternity, is your soul."

entries.title: Packaged Soul
entries.body: "The soul is but a divine package of primordial universal sounds, lights, vibrations, frequencies, and energy - assembled and customized to experience earthly, human life. A sacred configuration containing all cosmic forces, crafted for the journey of beings human on Earth

entries.title: Pain
entries.body: Pain is a natural meditative state—one that the brain, heart, and body instinctively know. If you truly want to understand meditation, learn from this and observe how the body directs thoughts, intention, and healing energy with sincere and undistracted attention to the place of injury, so recovery can begin.

entries.title: Prayers
entries.body: Prayers are like a sculptor’s chisel—breaking through the hardened layers that cover the soul, until what remains is the hidden masterpiece: a soul shaped in beauty, grace, and divine form.

entries.title: Realization
entries.body: "Realization and liberation mean dissolving the soul back to its basic building blocks- the vibration, light, sound, energy, and frequency that were packaged together for human experience."

entries.title: Reference Point
entries.body: For humans, love is the only true reference point to the Absolute God

entries.title: Secrets of the River
entries.body: "Learn the mystery of the rivers: The Divine has touched it, sanctified it, filled it with divine energy, then let it flow freely - so that through its waters, man may be cleansed and purified.

entries.title: Self-Luminous
entries.body: Mysticism isn’t about acquiring secret knowledge or power—it’s about unlearning all that you think you know, until only the light of the Absolute remains. This is swayam prakasham—self-luminosity. You shine like a radiant star, not by your own doing, but by the power of the ultimate source within

entries.title: Soul's Hunger
entries.body: "Your soul longs for spiritual advancement, but you feed it so little that it cannot take one step further."

entries.title: Soul's Journey
entries.body:
“Are you observing the soul’s sacred journey — or is your soul quietly witnessing you?
To truly understand, you must understand the difference between your ego-self and the soul.
Only then will you know that it's your soul’s own journey unfolding beyond the mind’s grasp
It's the sacred journey of the SOUL

entries.title: Spiritual Experiences
entries.body: "What good are spiritual experiences unless the soul is progressively advancing toward the goal?"

entries.title: Spiritual Practices
entries.body: "Prayer, meditation, chanting, and spiritual practices are merely divine distractions to trick the mind into being engaged in sacred activity - so your soul can take a break and connect with the source."

entries.title: Spiritual War
entries.body: Yoga is not about exercise or meditation - it's a physical, mental, and spiritual war to break the bond of the soul with the identified ego self, so that the soul can be free to take up its after journey."

entries.title: Take Me
entries.body: Take me and leave you

entries.title: The Grace of Light
entries.body: "I am but a small budding flower in a garden of flowers, trying to open my petals and spread my fragrance to receive the grace of light."

entries.title: In Shop of the God
entries.body: "In the Shop of the God, you are welcomed with a generous heart - take all you need, for there is no price, no bill. Every blessing, every grace, every moment of divine connection is ready for you to receive. But you need to prepare yourself to take it."

entries.title: The Song Within
entries.body: With every breath in and out you are playing a song inside which is heard by the soul. The singer is your heart and the instruments are your brain. Incorrect breathing will lead to a bad song, but rhythmic and gentle breathing will create a soft melodic sound and music."

entries.title: There’s no Me
entries.body: "Should I say I am in you or you are in me? Or there's nothing but you, so there's no me. La ilaha illa Allah."

entries.title: True Death
entries.body: True death occurs when the soul is freed and liberated from the bonds of desire and ascends to its source. This is the death that ends all dying - when the soul breaks free from the wheel of wanting and returns to its eternal home."

entries.title: Universal Language
entries.body: "Sound, music, vibration, and frequency is the universal language. Thus so your internal organs communicate. Not just the organs, but each cell, DNA, and every micro cosmic part in your body is communicating, interacting, and celebrating through music, sound, vibration, and frequency."

entries.title: Vibration of the Heart
entries.body: "The vibrations that arise in the heart from feelings like love and devotion offer a more sacred, direct connection to the Divine than vibrations created through singing, chanting, and talking."

entries.title: What is Breath
entries.body: "So what is breath? Don't you see - if you don't breathe for a few minutes, you quickly become unconscious. So breath is the flow of consciousness by means of air. We are flowing in and out of consciousness every time we breathe in and breathe out. It's the rhythm of the consciousness."

entries.title: What is Feeding the Soul
entries.body: "When you breathe, you are breathing sound, light, vibrations, energy, frequencies - which are the basic building blocks of your soul. This is what feeds the soul. When you stop breathing, the soul leaves the body and returns to the unmanifested state, waiting for the next body to manifest so it can continue survival."

entries.title: Basic Elements
entries.body: Realization and liberation are simply the unraveling of the soul back into its basic elements — the purest form in which it was first expressed: vibration, light, sound, energy, and frequency. The soul is not a fixed entity, but a sacred packaging of these eternal elements.”

entries.title: Wind
entries.body: “The birds, bees, and insects are blessed with the gift of hearing the divine melody hidden in the rustling of leaves and the gentle movement of flower petals moved by the wind.”

entries.title: Ether
entries.body: “Just as a fish swims in the ocean of water, man swims in the ocean of ether.

entries.title: Prana
entries.body: “Life force — prana — exists throughout the universe, but not in a form directly consumable by humans. That’s why the etheric field is created: to filter and calibrate prana to the precise frequency that the human system can receive, absorb, and thrive on.”

entries.title: Plato
entries.body:
“Plato’s Allegory of the Cave is not just philosophy — it’s a parable of the soul’s ignorance, awakening, and ascent beyond illusion.
It reminds us that what we first perceive as reality is but a shadow.
Think deeply, and you may see yourself in the cave — and the light beyond it.”

entries.title: Vibration
entries.body:
“Breathing generates a subtle oscillating vibration that reaches the innermost core of the heart, where the soul resides.
There, the soul swings and dances to this divine rhythm, drinking the nectar of prana — the life force itself.”

entries.title: Language
entries.body:
“Each person carries a unique inner language through which the sacred heart communicates with the divine soul — a language of vibration, feeling, rhythm, and pure intention.
But negative thoughts, emotions, and actions distort this sacred dialogue, turning it into noise and confusion.”

entries.title: Light of Soul
entries.body: “Just as a candle burns itself to reveal light, you must burn away desire, material attachments, and the ego-self to uncover the inner light of your soul.”

entries.title: River
entries.body:
“A radiant river receives, absorbs, bathes in, and reflects the beauty of sunlight — this is the river’s spiritual ecstasy.
In the same way, when divine light touches a human being, the soul is soaked, immersed, and begins to radiate that sacred light.
What we witness then is the spiritual ecstasy of a soul in union with the Divine.”

entries.title: Om and HU
entries.body:
“With each breath, prana enters the body and strikes the fire element within, sparking light and sound.
The light that emerges is of the highest divine nature, and the sounds that arise are the sacred universal tones — like Om and HU.”

entries.title: “Anyone can easily go wrong in practices like meditation or yoga if not guided w
entries.body:
But when one practices love, mercy, and grace — there is no way to go wrong.
These open the heart effortlessly to joy, peace, and divine connection.”
Practices
